checklist.criterion: Reads YAML template from assets/templates/ready-for-refinement.yaml before generating any output
Fetches PROJ-789 from Jira using jira_get_issue with at least summary, description, status, issuetype, issuelinks in fields
Does NOT fetch any incident ticket — no jira_get_issue call targets an INC-NNN key
Sets ticket.type to Investigation (not Bug, Feature, or Maintenance)
Populates context.background explaining the batch-processing service, the nightly export job, and the CloudWatch alarm pattern
Populates context.current_behaviour describing the memory accumulation observed in ResultAccumulator.process_batch()
conditions_of_satisfaction.must includes at least one MUST requirement for a written root-cause analysis or investigation deliverable
conditions_of_satisfaction.must or conditions_of_satisfaction.should includes a requirement for a proposed remediation plan
acceptance_criteria contains at least two items, including at least one measurable outcome (e.g. memory alarm does not re-fire after remediation is applied)
Validates YAML with validate-ticket.sh and fixes any errors before proceeding to markdown generation
Generates markdown file at YYYY/MM/YYYY-MM-DD-PROJ-789-ready-for-refinement.md using today's date
Validates markdown structure with the --markdown flag after generation
Reports YAML path, markdown path, validation result, and a one-paragraph summary on completion
